short_text: Mark Adair to Shanaka, , and a superb finish for SL. That was a low full toss at the sticks and Shanaka scoops it over s
full_text: Mark Adair to Shanaka, , and a superb finish for SL. That was a low full toss at the sticks and Shanaka scoops it over short fine for a four.

short_text: Mark Adair to Shanaka, , short ball, Shanaka gets on top of the short ball and pulls it away over deep mid for a sixer.
full_text: Mark Adair to Shanaka, , short ball, Shanaka gets on top of the short ball and pulls it away over deep mid for a sixer. Was hit really well and off the meat of the bat

short_text: Mark Adair to Chameera, 1 run, drags the ball across the line for a single
full_text: Mark Adair to Chameera, 1 run, drags the ball across the line for a single

short_text: Mark Adair to Karunaratne, Bowled!! Wow! That was right up there and the yorker disturbs the sticks. Terrific stuff from
full_text: Mark Adair to Karunaratne, Bowled!! Wow! That was right up there and the yorker disturbs the sticks. Terrific stuff from the bowler. The batter tried to slam it across the line but missed the line.

short_text: Mark Adair to Karunaratne, 2 runs, short ball, slower ball, Karunaratne drags the pull down wide of long-on for a brace.
full_text: Mark Adair to Karunaratne, 2 runs, short ball, slower ball, Karunaratne drags the pull down wide of long-on for a brace. The throw from the deep wasn't a great one

short_text: Mark Adair to Shanaka, 1 run, fuller length delivery outside off and hit hard and straight to long-off for a single
full_text: Mark Adair to Shanaka, 1 run, fuller length delivery outside off and hit hard and straight to long-off for a single

short_text: Joshua Little to Karunaratne, no run, fuller ball and Karunaratne jams it out. A dot ball to end a great spell. Joshua L
full_text: Joshua Little to Karunaratne, no run, fuller ball and Karunaratne jams it out. A dot ball to end a great spell. Joshua Little can be extremely proud of his spell. He did his job with aplomb.

short_text: Joshua Little to Nissanka, Caught by Neil Rock!! The fuller wide ball has done the trick. That was wide, outside off, Ni
full_text: Joshua Little to Nissanka, Caught by Neil Rock!! The fuller wide ball has done the trick. That was wide, outside off, Nissanka chases that and gets a faint one to edge it to the keeper. End of another wonderful knock from another young Lankan batter. He had to go for the runs and the execution just wasn't there.

short_text: Joshua Little to Shanaka, 1 run, slams that uppishly and into the long-off region for a single
full_text: Joshua Little to Shanaka, 1 run, slams that uppishly and into the long-off region for a single

short_text: Joshua Little to Nissanka, byes, 1 run, misses the pull off the short ball and the keeper fumbles to allow a single
full_text: Joshua Little to Nissanka, byes, 1 run, misses the pull off the short ball and the keeper fumbles to allow a single

short_text: Joshua Little to Shanaka, 1 run, walks down the track and powers it to long-on for a single
full_text: Joshua Little to Shanaka, 1 run, walks down the track and powers it to long-on for a single

short_text: Joshua Little to Shanaka, , walks down the track and hammers the pull as he picked up the short ball to send it away int
full_text: Joshua Little to Shanaka, , walks down the track and hammers the pull as he picked up the short ball to send it away into the gap for a four. Hit really hard. A dismissive hit and the third umpire had a few looks at it before coming to a conclusion

short_text: Young to Shanaka, 1 run, looks to pull, gets a top-edge and the ball lands over the bowler for a single
full_text: Young to Shanaka, 1 run, looks to pull, gets a top-edge and the ball lands over the bowler for a single

full_text: Young to Nissanka, 1 run, slogged across the line to deep mid for a single

full_text: Young to Shanaka, 1 run, fuller length delivery and has been driven to mid-off for a single

short_text: Young to Nissanka, 1 run, driven down to long-on for a single only as that landed just short of the man at long-on. That
full_text: Young to Nissanka, 1 run, driven down to long-on for a single only as that landed just short of the man at long-on. That was fuller, Nissanka slammed it and it landed on the bounce. The fielder was caught in two minds and didn't commit to the catch

short_text: Young to Shanaka, 1 run, tucks the ball away off the pads for a single as it angled in
full_text: Young to Shanaka, 1 run, tucks the ball away off the pads for a single as it angled in

full_text: Young to Shanaka, no run, slower short ball outside off and Shanaka misses the cut on the off-side

full_text: Joshua Little to Shanaka, 1 run, sends that into the off-side for a single as that was aimed for the sticks with a delivery that tailed in full

short_text: Joshua Little to Nissanka, leg byes, 1 run, walks across his sticks and looks to paddle it. The batter misses the ball a
full_text: Joshua Little to Nissanka, leg byes, 1 run, walks across his sticks and looks to paddle it. The batter misses the ball and it rolls away off the pads into the off-side for a single. Leg bye is the call

short_text: Joshua Little to Rajapaksa, Caught by Harry Tector!! Length delivery, Rajapaksa looks to whack it away on to the on-side
full_text: Joshua Little to Rajapaksa, Caught by Harry Tector!! Length delivery, Rajapaksa looks to whack it away on to the on-side but ends up finding the man at deep mid. That was hit to the longer part of the fence and that was easily taken.

short_text: Joshua Little to Rajapaksa, no run, fuller, Rajapaksa dances down and yorks himself to miss the ball which was just outs
full_text: Joshua Little to Rajapaksa, no run, fuller, Rajapaksa dances down and yorks himself to miss the ball which was just outside off

full_text: Joshua Little to Nissanka, 1 run, full toss, low one, just outside off and has been dragged down to long-on for a single

short_text: Joshua Little to Nissanka, , fuller, wider, Nissanka throws his bat at it and gets it fine for a four. Fortune favours t
full_text: Joshua Little to Nissanka, , fuller, wider, Nissanka throws his bat at it and gets it fine for a four. Fortune favours the young who has been brave enough today

short_text: Joshua Little to Nissanka, , phew that was a poor ball! Well wide outside off and landed almost on the full to the keepe
full_text: Joshua Little to Nissanka, , phew that was a poor ball! Well wide outside off and landed almost on the full to the keeper. Wided

full_text: Mark Adair to Nissanka, leg byes, 1 run, gets it away on to the on-side off the pads as he missed the clip

short_text: Mark Adair to Nissanka, no run, the ball got stuck with the batter as he tried to pinch a single and hence they didn't t
full_text: Mark Adair to Nissanka, no run, the ball got stuck with the batter as he tried to pinch a single and hence they didn't take a single

short_text: Mark Adair to Nissanka, , walks down the track and does it with clinical ease. The young man has a great head on his sho
full_text: Mark Adair to Nissanka, , walks down the track and does it with clinical ease. The young man has a great head on his shoulders. Didn't opt for a powerful shot but a dab between point and short third. Poor bowling as he bowled that delivery with the third man inside the circle

short_text: Mark Adair to Rajapaksa, 1 run, square of the wicket for a single as that was fuller outside off for the batter to squee
full_text: Mark Adair to Rajapaksa, 1 run, square of the wicket for a single as that was fuller outside off for the batter to squeeze that out

short_text: Mark Adair to Hasaranga, Caught by Young!! Backs away, slices and finds the man at short third. That was a slower fuller
full_text: Mark Adair to Hasaranga, Caught by Young!! Backs away, slices and finds the man at short third. That was a slower fuller length delivery outside off, Hasaranga threw his bat at it and only managed a fine edge. End of a terrific knock from the Lankan all-rounder. He took the attack to the opposition and has bailed Lanka out of a heavy mess.

short_text: Mark Adair to Nissanka, 1 run, Well deserved indeed. He has stood amidst tough times. That was a slower delivery and Nis
full_text: Mark Adair to Nissanka, 1 run, Well deserved indeed. He has stood amidst tough times. That was a slower delivery and Nissanka clipped it away into the on-side

full_text: Curtis Campher to Hasaranga, 2 runs, backs away and square drives it past point for a couple

full_text: Curtis Campher to Nissanka, 1 run, stays behind the line of the ball and pushes it away to point for a single

full_text: Curtis Campher to Nissanka, , and gets it away fine for a four but in a manner he wouldn't have wanted. That was short, top-edge and the ball goes away to fine leg for a four

full_text: Curtis Campher to Hasaranga, 1 run, backs away and mistimes the chop into the off-side. The throw came in at the bowler's end and the bowler fails to grab hold of it. Hasaranga was a goner despite him diving in to the crease

full_text: Curtis Campher to Hasaranga, , and slams it over cover as he got hold of the slower ball. Went down on one knee and powers it so easily. Maintained his shape despite a little shimmy down the track

full_text: Simi Singh to Hasaranga, , Hasaranga gets hold of the low full toss as Simi Singh aimed for the yorker. Then the batter opened the bat face and sliced it between point and short third for a four

full_text: Young to Hasaranga, 2 runs, . One who is climbing up the charts pretty quickly. That was short, Hasaranga stayed his crease and slammed it away with his horizontal bat for a brace

short_text: Young to Nissanka, leg byes, 1 run, Nissanka was saved on two accounts. First the review from Irish team went in his fav
full_text: Young to Nissanka, leg byes, 1 run, Nissanka was saved on two accounts. First the review from Irish team went in his favour and then the man at point missed the direct hit at the batter's end with the batter well down the 22 yards. Nissanka can breathe easy now

full_text: Young to Hasaranga, 1 run, gets that on to the off-side and steals a single. Short, wide, outside off and Hasaranga sliced that to deep point for a run

full_text: Young to Hasaranga, 1 run, gets that away into the off-side for a single as the batter tapped that into the off-side with soft hands for a single before the man at point could intercept

full_text: Curtis Campher to Nissanka, leg byes, 1 run, Instant apology from the bowler and importantly, no serious injury. Was a short of a length on leg stump, deflected off the pads towards the leg-side and they wanted to sneak a single

short_text: Young to Hasaranga, , Slower and shorter on leg stump, Hasaranga swivels and pulls this powerfully, clearing the big bou
full_text: Young to Hasaranga, , Slower and shorter on leg stump, Hasaranga swivels and pulls this powerfully, clearing the big boundary at long-on with ease. What a counterpunch this has been from the all-rounder!

full_text: Young to Hasaranga, 2 runs, one-handed miscue, just clears mid-wicket! More fortune for Hasaranga who looks to go hard on the slog, skews it over the infield

full_text: Young to Hasaranga, 1 run, Hard length, Hasaranga wanted to go downtown, ended up mistiming it horribly and he's fortunate that he did so. Could otherwise have holed out to the deep

short_text: Simi Singh to Hasaranga, , This is excellent intent from Hasaranga, he loves taking the spinners down and the best part
full_text: Simi Singh to Hasaranga, , This is excellent intent from Hasaranga, he loves taking the spinners down and the best part in this over was that there were no half-measures from his side. This is floated up, he stays still this time and lofts cleanly over mid-off

short_text: Simi Singh to Hasaranga, , this is a masterclass on hitting spin bowling from Hasaranga! Continues to back away, makes r
full_text: Simi Singh to Hasaranga, , this is a masterclass on hitting spin bowling from Hasaranga! Continues to back away, makes room and Singh is actually making things easier by feeding length balls. Smoked over cover

short_text: Simi Singh to Hasaranga, , an even better shot! Makes room again, Singh goes wider this time and this has been hit insid
full_text: Simi Singh to Hasaranga, , an even better shot! Makes room again, Singh goes wider this time and this has been hit inside out over extra cover. Cleanly hit over the infield. Super batting

short_text: Simi Singh to Hasaranga, , shot! Hasaranga is a superb player of spin and he wants to maximise these remaining deliverie
full_text: Simi Singh to Hasaranga, , shot! Hasaranga is a superb player of spin and he wants to maximise these remaining deliveries of the powerplay. Backs away early, makes room and slap-cuts this away through the gap at cover. Picked it from a middle-and-leg line, so there was a bit of risk but he knew what he was doing

full_text: Simi Singh to Hasaranga, no run, makes room for the inside out loft, cue-ends it towards mid-off

short_text: Mark Adair to Hasaranga, , Sri Lankan fans finding their voice back. A slower delivery by Mark Adair, pitched up by him
full_text: Mark Adair to Hasaranga, , Sri Lankan fans finding their voice back. A slower delivery by Mark Adair, pitched up by him and Hasaranga has creamed this past the fielder at mid-on with a straight bat face. No chance to stop that, no need to run for it either..

full_text: Mark Adair to Nissanka, , back-to-back boundaries! Short of a length outside off, Nissanka plays it late as his cuts bisects the fielder at point and third man, lovely timing

full_text: Mark Adair to Nissanka, , Mark Adair goes full and Nissanka gets an outside edge as he tries to squeeze this out. Third man sprints across, but the ball was absolutely rollicking along the turf

full_text: Joshua Little to Hasaranga, , that was much needed for Sri Lanka! A short of a length delivery on off, Hasaranga rides the bounce and punches it through covers as the ball bisects the fielders inside the ring and rockets away to the fence

full_text: Joshua Little to Nissanka, leg byes, 1 run, hurried up for pace, a short and quick delivery on middle and leg, sliding along the deck as Nissanka gets beaten on his hook, gets hit on the thigh as the ball rolls into the leg-side

full_text: Joshua Little to Hasaranga, 1 run, on the shorter side at 140kph, Hasaranga goes for a punch and gets an outside edge that flies down to third man yet again

full_text: Young to Nissanka, no run, played to point from within the crease

short_text: Joshua Little to Hasaranga, no run, This is a dream start for Ireland. A short of a length delivery on off and Hasaranga
full_text: Joshua Little to Hasaranga, no run, This is a dream start for Ireland. A short of a length delivery on off and Hasaranga defends it off his back foot

short_text: Joshua Little to Hasaranga, , Joshua Little will have to reload that as he has sprayed this one down the leg-side, and t
full_text: Joshua Little to Hasaranga, , Joshua Little will have to reload that as he has sprayed this one down the leg-side, and the keeper can get only a glove to it as he dives to his left

short_text: Joshua Little to Hasaranga, no run, nervy defence by Hasaranga as he faces the hat-trick ball, gets an inside edge onto
full_text: Joshua Little to Hasaranga, no run, nervy defence by Hasaranga as he faces the hat-trick ball, gets an inside edge onto his shoe

short_text: Joshua Little to Avishka Fernando, Bowled!! Little, you beauty! That's a golden duck for Avishka Fernando. He walks back
full_text: Joshua Little to Avishka Fernando, Bowled!! Little, you beauty! That's a golden duck for Avishka Fernando. He walks back without troubling the scorers, just like Perera did. What a peach of a delivery that. Pitched up by the left-arm pacer and Avishka Fernando gets beaten on his defence as the ball shapes in. The stumps have been rattled and Sri Lanka sink further.

short_text: Joshua Little to Chandimal, Bowled!! Joshua Little strikes! Sri Lanka in trouble yet again. Short of a length around off
full_text: Joshua Little to Chandimal, Bowled!! Joshua Little strikes! Sri Lanka in trouble yet again. Short of a length around off but very close to the body. Chandimal goes for a cut through point and gets an inside edge that rocks back his stumps. It has been chopped on and Sri Lanka's trouble with the top order continues.

short_text: Joshua Little to Chandimal, , width on offer, it's tad fuller and Chandimal shimmies down the wicket to reach out for it
full_text: Joshua Little to Chandimal, , width on offer, it's tad fuller and Chandimal shimmies down the wicket to reach out for it with a stretch. Goes down on his knee and drills this through cover-point for four runs

short_text: Joshua Little to Chandimal, no run, short of a length outside off, the ball skids along the deck as Chandimal gets beate
full_text: Joshua Little to Chandimal, no run, short of a length outside off, the ball skids along the deck as Chandimal gets beaten on his cut

short_text: Stirling to Chandimal, 1 run, a superb over by Stirling, a wicket in that and he was economical too. Was darted on middl
full_text: Stirling to Chandimal, 1 run, a superb over by Stirling, a wicket in that and he was economical too. Was darted on middle and leg as the batsman nudged this to square leg for one

short_text: Stirling to Chandimal, no run, tad shorter on off, Chandimal punches it back to Stirling who stops it with a dive to his
full_text: Stirling to Chandimal, no run, tad shorter on off, Chandimal punches it back to Stirling who stops it with a dive to his left

short_text: Stirling to Nissanka, 1 run, eased down the track by Nissanka for one more
full_text: Stirling to Nissanka, 1 run, eased down the track by Nissanka for one more

short_text: Stirling to Chandimal, 1 run, floated on middle and leg, Chandimal drives this to long-on for one
full_text: Stirling to Chandimal, 1 run, floated on middle and leg, Chandimal drives this to long-on for one

short_text: Stirling to Kusal Perera, Caught by Gareth Delany!! Kusal Perera's poor run in T20Is continues as he departs without tro
full_text: Stirling to Kusal Perera, Caught by Gareth Delany!! Kusal Perera's poor run in T20Is continues as he departs without troubling the scorers. Was a floated delivery outside off and Kusal Perera checks his drive, chipping it to cover. Delany stationed there moves to his left and puts in a dive to grab it with one hand, and he's got his fingers underneath. Stirling was into the attack to bowl against the left-hander and he has done his job!

short_text: Stirling to Nissanka, 1 run, Stirling goes full and Nissanka drives this to long-on and gets off the mark
full_text: Stirling to Nissanka, 1 run, Stirling goes full and Nissanka drives this to long-on and gets off the mark

short_text: Karunaratne to Joshua Little, Bowled!!That was a fuller ball at the sticks and Joshua Little wanted to paddle it fine. H
full_text: Karunaratne to Joshua Little, Bowled!!That was a fuller ball at the sticks and Joshua Little wanted to paddle it fine. He was too much across the sticks and missed the paddle to be clean bowled. Big win for SL and they are almost through to the next round thanks to the performance tonight.

full_text: Karunaratne to Simi Singh, 1 run, Simi Singh chips down the track and drives the ball to cover for a single

full_text: Karunaratne to Simi Singh, no run, fuller delivery, down leg, Simi Singh misses the clip as the ball goes off the pads to the keeper

full_text: Chameera to Joshua Little, no run, right up there outside off, Joshua Little looks to big and misses

short_text: Chameera to Young, Bowled!! Right up there and Young misses the line to be clean bowled. The inch perfect yorker bowled
full_text: Chameera to Young, Bowled!! Right up there and Young misses the line to be clean bowled. The inch perfect yorker bowled at a good pace and the batter wasn't up to it. Ireland are going down like a lead balloon. Lanka have been clinical with the ball.

full_text: Hasaranga to Young, no run, tossed up delivery outside off, Young fails to connect on the slog sweep, The keeper whips the bails off but the back foot hadn't moved. The third umpire was called in to have a look and he signalled it in favour of the batter

full_text: Hasaranga to Young, no run, fuller delivery and Young fails to clip it away

short_text: Kumara to Balbirnie, Caught by Avishka Fernando!! Fuller delivery, Balbirnie backs away and slices it to find the man at
full_text: Kumara to Balbirnie, Caught by Avishka Fernando!! Fuller delivery, Balbirnie backs away and slices it to find the man at point, Good catch from Fernando. Didn't do much with the bat but takes a good catch. The NRR will help SL as well as this game is heading towards a one-sided finish. That was hit well but straight to the fielder.

full_text: Kumara to Simi Singh, 1 run, played down to long-on for a single

short_text: Kumara to Mark Adair, Mark Adair Run Out!! And Ireland falling like nine pins. That was hit straight to mid-off and Mark
full_text: Kumara to Mark Adair, Mark Adair Run Out!! And Ireland falling like nine pins. That was hit straight to mid-off and Mark Adair wanted a single. The fielder at mid-off came up with a direct hit. The batsman was well short. Was a fuller ball and played away to mid-off. The direct hit did the trick.

short_text: M Theekshana to Balbirnie, no run, right up there and Balbirnie misses that as that was too full to put it away. End of
full_text: M Theekshana to Balbirnie, no run, right up there and Balbirnie misses that as that was too full to put it away. End of a fab spell from M Theekshana. from the young man would give him a lot of confidence going into the main round

full_text: M Theekshana to Mark Adair, 1 run, mistimes the pull down to long-on for a single

short_text: M Theekshana to Neil Rock, Stumped!! The keeper was always confident and Lanka have another. That was a tossed up delive
full_text: M Theekshana to Neil Rock, Stumped!! The keeper was always confident and Lanka have another. That was a tossed up delivery outside off and Neil Rock missed the slog sweep but he dragged his feet outside the crease. The keeper whipped the bails to catch him short. The third umpire had a few looks before signalling it out. Ireland lose another one. Lanka close in on qualification for the main round.

full_text: M Theekshana to Neil Rock, no run, short, almost at the sticks

full_text: Kumara to Neil Rock, 1 run, Kumara starightaway looks for a yorker and Neil Rock clips that away on to the on-side for a single

short_text: Kumara to Harry Tector, Caught by Kusal Perera!! The new man at the crease has been done in by the fastish short ball. H
full_text: Kumara to Harry Tector, Caught by Kusal Perera!! The new man at the crease has been done in by the fastish short ball. Harry Tector went for the pull but managed only a feather off the gloves for the keeper to take a simple catch. That was quick, just over the shoulder and Harry Tector was cramped for room. Ireland losing their way a bit. Lanka on the prowl.

full_text: M Theekshana to Curtis Campher, Bowled!! Curtis Campher is gone! Seemed he had slippery gloves as he missed the slog sweep to be clean bowled. That was a well tossed up delivery and Curtis Campher missed the slog sweep to be clean bowled. The resistance from Curtis Campher has ended. He did well but needed to kick on as he had consumed a few deliveries.

short_text: M Theekshana to Stirling, Caught by Kumara!! Walks across his sticks, looks to sweep and gets it off the soft top-edge f
full_text: M Theekshana to Stirling, Caught by Kumara!! Walks across his sticks, looks to sweep and gets it off the soft top-edge for the man at short fine to take it. There was a bobble for the fielder to deal with as he juggled it. But took it in the end. That was well tossed up and Stirling played his shot a little t0o early.

short_text: M Theekshana to Stirling, , tossed up delivery and has been slog swept away to deep square for a four. That was well tos
full_text: M Theekshana to Stirling, , tossed up delivery and has been slog swept away to deep square for a four. That was well tossed up and Stirling slammed the slog sweep away. In the gap and four

full_text: M Theekshana to Stirling, no run, flatter delivery decks in, Stirling looks to slog and gets it off the inside edge on to the on-side

short_text: Chameera to Balbirnie, , bangs it in short, Balbirnie somehow gets bat to it and gets it away to fine leg for a four. Th
full_text: Chameera to Balbirnie, , bangs it in short, Balbirnie somehow gets bat to it and gets it away to fine leg for a four. That was banged in short, Balbirnie wanted to pull it and got into a tangle. Off the gloves I reckon and off to the fence

full_text: Chameera to Stirling, 1 run, off the inside edge and the ball rolls away to fine leg for a single. Stirling wanted to slog and ended up getting an inside edge for the ball to miss the sticks

full_text: Chameera to Balbirnie, 1 run, length delivery, Balbirnie nudges the ball away off the inner half of the bat between mid-wicket and mid-on for a single

short_text: Karunaratne to Kevin O Brien, Caught by M Theekshana!! That was a top-edge. The fielder at short fine circled under it a
full_text: Karunaratne to Kevin O Brien, Caught by M Theekshana!! That was a top-edge. The fielder at short fine circled under it and takes it easily. That was banged in short, Kevin O Brien went for the slam on the on-side and got a top-edge. The fielder seemed to be under some problems as the ball swirled a little but took it well.

full_text: Karunaratne to Stirling, 1 run, dropped! That was short, banged in, Stirling goes for the pull and gets a top-edge. The fielder covered some ground, got hands to it and ended up dropping it
